name: Narrative And Continuity Fixtures
description: Propose a curated benchmark_fixture_library addition set for narrative and continuity fixtures.
related_rules: Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.
Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
related_validators: Periodically re-calibrate automated evaluators against human rubric benchmarks for both narrative and dialogue.
related_failure_modes: Memory benchmarks encourage benchmark-specific pattern learning instead of general long-range reasoning.
Narrative coherence benchmarks are gamed via checklist inclusion, not genuine plot logic.
State-tracking continuity checker cascades extraction errors and reports false contradictions.
